summary: Tested Content List menu item relocation and route access. Found and fixed critical RBAC rule missing bug - Content List page was showing 403 due to missing route pattern in adminRbac.js.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Missing RBAC route rule for /admin/site-design/content-list in adminRbac.js causing 403 error
context_for_next_testing_agent: Content List page now accessible after adding RBAC route rule. Menu order verified: Content Builder 1st, Content List 2nd in Site İç Tasarımı section. Table columns verified: page_type, country, module, category/scope, status, version, updated_at, actions. Edit, Delete, Kopyala buttons visible in actions column.

menu_order_verification.details: Content Builder is 1st, Content List is 2nd in Site İç Tasarımı sidebar menu

content_list_table_columns.details: Columns found: page_type, country, module, category / scope, status, version, updated_at, actions

content_list_actions.details: Edit, Delete, Kopyala buttons visible in actions column

fix_applied.change: Added missing route rule: { pattern: /^\/admin\/site-design\/content-list$/, roles: ['super_admin', 'country_admin'] }
